title: Minimum Operations to Make Array Equal
titleCn: 使数组中所有元素相等的最小操作数

testcases.input: n = 3 Output: 2 Explanation: arr = [1, 3, 5] First operation choose x = 2 and y = 0, this leads arr to be [2, 3, 4] In the second operation choose x = 2 and y = 0 again, thus arr = [3, 3, 3].
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: arr = [1, 3, 5] First operation choose x = 2 and y = 0, this leads arr to be [2, 3, 4] In the second operation choose x = 2 and y = 0 again, thus arr = [3, 3, 3].
